title: EZCoords
description: A fabric mod to make copying coordinates as easy as possible.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eCrRmMwV/images/ef8e5f9266a741d75371bac21ff8ee6af47de887.png)
A fabric mod to make copying coordinates as easy as possible.
### Usage You can copy your current coordinates by either pressing the configurable keybind (default: "O") or by using the `/coords` command. If you want to copy the coordinates of the block you're looking, use the configurable keybind (default "I") or by using the `/coords block` command. ### Config You can access the config values with the `/coords config`: * `command_block_mode` - Copies ONLY the coordinates (X: 1, Y: 1, Z: 3 -> 1 2 3)
